commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Disciples. These were apparently disciples of St. John the Baptist, who believed in Christ from his testimony, and had received no farther instruction, nor any baptism but John's. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Accordingly, in the Acts of the Apostles, we find that men who had "John's baptism "had not received the Holy Spirit, whom they knew not even by hearing.
